intro: Apium graveolens extract, also known as celery seed extract, is derived from the seeds of the Apium graveolens plant and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. This extract is rich in compounds such as limonene, apiol, and bergapten, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties. Studies have suggested that apium graveolens extract may have potential therapeutic applications in managing conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and certain types of cancer.
